description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric layout. The structure features a prominent driveway leading to a garage, a red car parked in front, and landscaped green lawns on both sides. Large windows line the sides and rear, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces, while a cylindrical water tank and a rectangular pool are visible in the backyard. The front facade is defined by a combination of white and gray exterior walls, with a clear separation between the garage and main entrance. The rear of the bungalow opens up to a spacious patio area, ideal for outdoor activities. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, minimalism, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and landscaped lawns. Features include a garage, backyard pool, and open patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a red car parked outside.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and side lawn, with the pool and water tank visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, pool, large windows, and water tank, with interior living spaces visible.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the driveway, side lawn, and the transition from the front to the backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and rear windows
